skills.name: Test Case Generator
skills.description: Generate comprehensive test cases from requirements, covering happy paths, edge cases, and error scenarios.
skills.promptPreview: Generate test cases for [feature/requirement]. Include happy path, boundary conditions, error scenarios, and expected results.

skills.name: E2E Test Script Writer
skills.description: Write Playwright or Cypress end-to-end test scripts from user journey descriptions.
skills.promptPreview: Write a Playwright E2E test for [user journey]. Include page navigation, assertions, and test data setup/teardown.
